module_description: Monitors NTP server time synchronization. Alerts when the time offset between the system clock and the NTP server exceeds the configured threshold.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable NTP monitoring for this entry.
hints.threads: Number of servers to check in parallel.
hints.max_offset: Maximum allowed time offset in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.timeout: Socket timeout in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.server: NTP server hostname or IP address (default: pool.ntp.org).
hints.port: UDP port to connect to. Leave empty (0) to use the standard NTP port 123.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new NTP server or identifier:
